_comment: Manually confirmed api_football_id -> wikipedia_name pairs for residual cases the automated matcher (pipeline/build_player_wiki.py) couldn't resolve by rule. Keyed by api_football_id (not name) so a future fixture rendering this same person under yet another name string still resolves correctly — the id is the stable identity, not the string. Confirmed by cross-referencing api-football's /players endpoint (firstname/lastname/birth date) against pipeline/wc2026_players.csv's birth_date, or by web search where noted.

Argentina.note: Two different Argentina players both render as the identical string 'L. Martinez' in lineups (this one + Lautaro Martínez below) — no textual signal distinguishes them, so build_player_wiki.py now routes exact-duplicate api names straight to manual review instead of risking a silent wrong guess. Confirmed via /players id 2467: born 1998-01-18, Gualeguay — exact match against the CSV.
See id 2467 above — same 'L. Martinez' collision. Confirmed via /players id 217: born 1997-08-22, Bahía Blanca — exact match against the CSV.

Brazil.note: Two different Brazil goalkeepers both render as the identical string 'Ederson' in lineups. Full name Ederson Santana de Moraes, born 1993-08-17 Osasco — exact match against the CSV.
See id 617 above — same 'Ederson' collision. Full name Éderson José dos Santos Lourenço da Silva, born 1999-07-07 Campo Grande — exact match against the CSV.

Cape Verde.note: Roberto Carlos 'Pico' Lopes, born 17 June 1992 Crumlin/Dublin
Kevin Lenini Gonçalves Pereira de Pina, born 27 January 1997 (exact match)
Diney's full name: Edilson Alberto Monteiro Sanches Borges
Coach nickname, same pattern as Diney/Pico — real name Pedro Leitão Brito, confirmed via web search (FIFA.com, CAFOnline)

Croatia.note: Two different Croatia players both render as the identical string 'M. Pasalic' in lineups. Born 1995-02-09 Mainz — exact match against the CSV.
See id 2763 above — same 'M. Pasalic' collision. Born 2000-09-14 Karlsruhe — exact match against the CSV.

Egypt.note: born 2000-05-15 Giza, exact match; also known as 'Oufa Shobeir'
full name Nabil Emad Al El Mahdy, born 1996-04-06, exact match

Ghana.note: firstname 'Issahaku Abdul', born 2004-03-08 Tamale, exact match

Iraq.note: api-football has TWO player ids for this one real person, both #15 defender in different Iraq fixtures. His Wikipedia page gives the full name 'Ahmed Hassan Maknzi Salman Al-Lami Al-Reeshawee' — 'Al-Reeshawee' is a trailing tribal/family name component of the same person, not a different player.

Second id for the same person as 665478 above — see that entry. Listed explicitly here (even though this exact name string would auto-match on its own) because a 1:1 bipartite matcher can only ever pair one api id to Wikipedia's single 'Ahmed Maknzi' entry; without this entry, whichever id resolves first via the confirmed list steals the only available wiki slot and strands the other.

Jordan.note: firstname 'Ehsan Nabil Farhan' — Ehsan/Ihsan transliteration variant, born 1994-02-05 Irbid, exact match
'Shararh' is a nickname unrelated to his real name (Mohammed Abu Zurayq); born 1997-12-30, exact match
different surname entirely, but birth date matches exactly (2005-07-13) — only signal available, no birthplace on record

Morocco.note: well-known stage name; born 1991-04-05 Montreal, exact match

Paraguay.note: Roberto 'Gatito' Fernández Torres — confirmed by web search, no birth date available via api-football's /players endpoint for this id

Qatar.note: firstname 'Homam Elamin Mohamed', lastname 'Ahmed' — born 1999-08-25 Doha, exact match

Senegal.note: api-football's /coachs profile for this id gives firstname 'Pape Bouna', lastname 'Thiaw', born 1981-02-05 Dakar — exact match against the CSV. The lineup-rendered name ('Bouna Thiaw Pape') has its tokens scrambled relative to both the /coachs profile ('P. Thiaw') and the wiki name — yet another instance of api-football's own data being inconsistent about a person's name across its own endpoints/fixtures.

South Africa.note: firstname "Sphephelo S'Miso" — born 1999-03-03 Durban, exact match

South Korea.note: Korean name order (family name first) vs api-football's Western order (given name first) — born 1969-02-12 Seoul, exact match via /coachs profile

Tunisia.note: api-football's own /players/profiles lookup for this id returns a different rendering ('C. Abdelmouhib') with no birth date — accepted by elimination (only remaining Tunisia candidate, and 'Abdelmouhib' contains 'mouhib'), not birthdate-confirmed like the others in this file
full name 'Mohamed Belhadj Mahmoud' — each source renders a different substring of the compound surname; born 2000-04-24, exact match

Uzbekistan.note: kh/h transliteration variant, born 1996-02-13, exact match
